SELECT DISTINCT CAST('$$PROCESS_TYPE='||''''||PROCESS_TYPE||'''' AS VARCHAR(1000) )
FROM $$ETLVWDB.WI_OVERLAY_PROCESS_CONTROL 
WHERE  ACTIVE_IND='Y'  AND PROCESS_TYPE='DRR' 
UNION
